lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਨਦਰੀ ਪਾਈਐ ਤਾ ਅਨਦਿਨੁ ਲਾਗੈ ਧਿਆਨੁ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: naanak nadaree paaeeai taa anadin laagai dhiaan |2|
lines.english: O Nanak, when the Lord bestows His Glance of Grace, then, night and day, one centers his meditation on the Lord. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਸੁਖਦਾਤਾ ਮਨਿ ਵਸੈ ਹਉਮੈ ਜਾਇ ਗੁਮਾਨੁ ॥
lines.translit: har sukhadaataa man vasai haumai jaae gumaan |
lines.english: The Lord, the Giver of peace, shall dwell in your mind, and your egotism and pride shall depart.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਦਰਹੁ ਕਪਟੁ ਵਿਕਾਰੁ ਗਇਆ ਮਨੁ ਸਹਜੇ ਜਿਤਾ ॥
lines.translit: andarahu kapatt vikaar geaa man sahaje jitaa |
lines.english: Deception and wickedness have departed from within him, and he easily conquers his mind.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤੁ ਸੰਤੋਖੁ ਸਭੁ ਸਚੁ ਹੈ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਪਵਿਤਾ ॥
lines.translit: sat santokh sabh sach hai guramukh pavitaa |
lines.english: The Gurmukh is totally truthful, content and pure.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਨਦਿਨੁ ਹਰਿ ਕੇ ਗੁਣ ਰਵੈ ਗੁਣ ਪਰਗਟੁ ਕਿਤਾ ॥
lines.translit: anadin har ke gun ravai gun paragatt kitaa |
lines.english: Night and day, he sings the Glorious Praises of the Lord, and manifests the excellence of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਹ ਜੋਤਿ ਪ੍ਰਗਾਸੁ ਅਨੰਦ ਰਸੁ ਅਗਿਆਨੁ ਗਵਿਤਾ ॥
lines.translit: teh jot pragaas anand ras agiaan gavitaa |
lines.english: There, the Divine Light and the essence of bliss are manifest, and ignorance is eliminated.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕੁ ਮਃ ੩ ॥
lines.translit: salok mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Salok, Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਬ੍ਰਹਮੁ ਬਿੰਦੇ ਸੋ ਬ੍ਰਾਹਮਣੁ ਕਹੀਐ ਜਿ ਅਨਦਿਨੁ ਹਰਿ ਲਿਵ ਲਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: braham binde so braahaman kaheeai ji anadin har liv laae |
lines.english: One who understands God, who lovingly centers his mind on the Lord night and day, is called a Brahmin.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਭਨਾ ਦਾਤਾ ਏਕੁ ਹੈ ਇਕੋ ਹਰਿ ਮਿਤਾ ॥੯॥
lines.translit: sabhanaa daataa ek hai iko har mitaa |9|
lines.english: The One Lord is the Giver of all; the Lord alone is our friend. ||9||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਪੁਛੈ ਸਚੁ ਸੰਜਮੁ ਕਮਾਵੈ ਹਉਮੈ ਰੋਗੁ ਤਿਸੁ ਜਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: satigur puchhai sach sanjam kamaavai haumai rog tis jaae |
lines.english: Consulting the True Guru, he practices Truth and self-restraint, and he is rid of the disease of ego.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਗੁਣ ਗਾਵੈ ਗੁਣ ਸੰਗ੍ਰਹੈ ਜੋਤੀ ਜੋਤਿ ਮਿਲਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: har gun gaavai gun sangrahai jotee jot milaae |
lines.english: He sings the Glorious Praises of the Lord, and gathers in His Praises; his light is blended with the Light.

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਸੁ ਜੁਗ ਮਹਿ ਕੋ ਵਿਰਲਾ ਬ੍ਰਹਮ ਗਿਆਨੀ ਜਿ ਹਉਮੈ ਮੇਟਿ ਸਮਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: eis jug meh ko viralaa braham giaanee ji haumai mett samaae |
lines.english: In this world, one who knows God is very rare; eradicating ego, he is absorbed in God.

lines.translit: mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਤਿਸ ਨੋ ਮਿਲਿਆ ਸਦਾ ਸੁਖੁ ਪਾਈਐ ਜਿ ਅਨਦਿਨੁ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਧਿਆਏ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: naanak tis no miliaa sadaa sukh paaeeai ji anadin har naam dhiaae |1|
lines.english: O Nanak, meeting him, peace is obtained; night and day, he meditates on the Lord's Name. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਤਰਿ ਕਪਟੁ ਮਨਮੁਖ ਅਗਿਆਨੀ ਰਸਨਾ ਝੂਠੁ ਬੋਲਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: antar kapatt manamukh agiaanee rasanaa jhootth bolaae |
lines.english: Within the ignorant self-willed manmukh is deception; with his tongue, he speaks lies.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਪਟਿ ਕੀਤੈ ਹਰਿ ਪੁਰਖੁ ਨ ਭੀਜੈ ਨਿਤ ਵੇਖੈ ਸੁਣੈ ਸੁਭਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: kapatt keetai har purakh na bheejai nit vekhai sunai subhaae |
lines.english: Practicing deception, he does not please the Lord God, who always sees and hears with natural ease.

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੂਜੈ ਭਾਇ ਜਾਇ ਜਗੁ ਪਰਬੋਧੈ ਬਿਖੁ ਮਾਇਆ ਮੋਹ ਸੁਆਇ ॥
lines.translit: doojai bhaae jaae jag parabodhai bikh maaeaa moh suaae |
lines.english: In the love of duality, he goes to instruct the world, but he is engrossed in the poison of Maya and attachment to pleasure.

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਤੁ ਕਮਾਣੈ ਸਦਾ ਦੁਖੁ ਪਾਵੈ ਜੰਮੈ ਮਰੈ ਫਿਰਿ ਆਵੈ ਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: eit kamaanai sadaa dukh paavai jamai marai fir aavai jaae |
lines.english: By doing so, he suffers in constant pain; he is born and then dies, and comes and goes again and again.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸ ਨੋ ਕ੍ਰਿਪਾ ਕਰੇ ਮੇਰਾ ਸੁਆਮੀ ਤਿਸੁ ਗੁਰ ਕੀ ਸਿਖ ਸੁਣਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: jis no kripaa kare meraa suaamee tis gur kee sikh sunaae |
lines.english: One, unto whom my Lord Master shows His Mercy, listens to the Guru's Teachings.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਹਸਾ ਮੂਲਿ ਨ ਚੁਕਈ ਵਿਚਿ ਵਿਸਟਾ ਪਚੈ ਪਚਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: sahasaa mool na chukee vich visattaa pachai pachaae |
lines.english: His doubts do not leave him at all, and he rots away in manure.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨਾ ਹੁਕਮੁ ਮਨਾਇਓਨੁ ਤੇ ਪੂਰੇ ਸੰਸਾਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: jinaa hukam manaaeon te poore sansaar |
lines.english: Those who obey the Hukam of the Lord's Command, are the perfect persons in the world.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਧਿਆਵੈ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੋ ਗਾਵੈ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੋ ਅੰਤਿ ਛਡਾਇ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: har naam dhiaavai har naamo gaavai har naamo ant chhaddaae |2|
lines.english: He meditates on the Lord's Name, and sings the Lord's Name; in the end, the Lord's Name will deliver him. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਹਿਬੁ ਸੇਵਨੑਿ ਆਪਣਾ ਪੂਰੈ ਸਬਦਿ ਵੀਚਾਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: saahib sevana aapanaa poorai sabad veechaar |
lines.english: They serve their Lord Master, and reflect upon the Perfect Word of the Shabad.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਕੀ ਸੇਵਾ ਚਾਕਰੀ ਸਚੈ ਸਬਦਿ ਪਿਆਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: har kee sevaa chaakaree sachai sabad piaar |
lines.english: They serve the Lord, and love the True Word of the Shabad.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਮਿਲਿ ਰਹੇ ਜਪਿ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮਾ ਉਰ ਧਾਰਿ ॥੧੦॥
lines.translit: naanak guramukh mil rahe jap har naamaa ur dhaar |10|
lines.english: O Nanak, the Gurmukhs remain united with Him, chanting the Name of the Lord, and enshrining it within their hearts. ||10||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਕਾ ਮਹਲੁ ਤਿਨੑੀ ਪਾਇਆ ਜਿਨੑ ਹਉਮੈ ਵਿਚਹੁ ਮਾਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: har kaa mehal tinaee paaeaa jina haumai vichahu maar |
lines.english: They attain the Mansion of the Lord's Presence, as they eradicate egotism from within.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਧਿਆਨ ਸਹਜ ਧੁਨਿ ਉਪਜੈ ਸਚਿ ਨਾਮਿ ਚਿਤੁ ਲਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: guramukh dhiaan sehaj dhun upajai sach naam chit laaeaa |
lines.english: The Gurmukh meditates on the Lord; the celestial sound-current resounds within him, and he focuses his consciousness on the True Name.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕੁ ਮਃ ੩ ॥
lines.translit: salok mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Salok, Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਅਨਦਿਨੁ ਰਹੈ ਰੰਗਿ ਰਾਤਾ ਹਰਿ ਕਾ ਨਾਮੁ ਮਨਿ ਭਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: guramukh anadin rahai rang raataa har kaa naam man bhaaeaa |
lines.english: The Gurmukh remains imbued with the Lord's Love, night and day; his mind is pleased with the Name of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਹਰਿ ਵੇਖਹਿ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਹਰਿ ਬੋਲਹਿ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਹਰਿ ਸਹਜਿ ਰੰਗੁ ਲਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: guramukh har vekheh guramukh har boleh guramukh har sehaj rang laaeaa |
lines.english: The Gurmukh beholds the Lord, the Gurmukh speaks of the Lord, and the Gurmukh naturally loves the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਗਿਆਨੁ ਪਰਾਪਤਿ ਹੋਵੈ ਤਿਮਰ ਅਗਿਆਨੁ ਅਧੇਰੁ ਚੁਕਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: naanak guramukh giaan paraapat hovai timar agiaan adher chukaaeaa |
lines.english: O Nanak, the Gurmukh attains spiritual wisdom, and the pitch-black darkness of ignorance is dispelled.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸ ਨੋ ਕਰਮੁ ਹੋਵੈ ਧੁਰਿ ਪੂਰਾ ਤਿਨਿ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਧਿਆਇਆ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: jis no karam hovai dhur pooraa tin guramukh har naam dhiaaeaa |1|
lines.english: One who is blessed by the Perfect Lord's Grace - as Gurmukh, he meditates on the Lord's Name. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਜਿਨਾ ਨ ਸੇਵਿਓ ਸਬਦਿ ਨ ਲਗੋ ਪਿਆਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: satigur jinaa na sevio sabad na lago piaar |
lines.english: Those who do not serve the True Guru do not embrace love for the Word of the Shabad.

lines.translit: mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਹਜੇ ਨਾਮੁ ਨ ਧਿਆਇਆ ਕਿਤੁ ਆਇਆ ਸੰਸਾਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: sahaje naam na dhiaaeaa kit aaeaa sansaar |
lines.english: They do not meditate on the Celestial Naam, the Name of the Lord - why did they even bother to come into the world?

lines.gurmukhi: ਕੂੜੈ ਲਾਲਚਿ ਲਗਿਆ ਨਾ ਉਰਵਾਰੁ ਨ ਪਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: koorrai laalach lagiaa naa uravaar na paar |
lines.english: They are attached to false greed; they are not on this shore, nor on the one beyond.

lines.gurmukhi: ਫਿਰਿ ਫਿਰਿ ਜੂਨੀ ਪਾਈਐ ਵਿਸਟਾ ਸਦਾ ਖੁਆਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: fir fir joonee paaeeai visattaa sadaa khuaar |
lines.english: Time and time again, they are reincarnated, and they rot away forever in manure.
